text: Standing at the threshold between the mundane and the imaginative, I sense the promise of discovery. The first scene, with its utilitarian glass walls and fire equipment, feels clinical yet transitional—a place waiting for meaning. Moving to the vibrant "R+D" wall, inspiration surges in me. Here, human curiosity is celebrated, inviting me to dwell on the perpetual interplay between knowledge and creation. I feel energized, eager to contemplate the artifice and possibilities of research and design.
